athletes.title: Till this day I still think this is the smartest (academically) aw channel
athletes.summary: Dennis Cyplenkov uses an arm dominant style of armwrestling. Even when Dennis has minimal hand control, actually pinning him is a nightmare because of how sticky his arm angle is close to the pad. Levan's immense backpressure at the angle shown in the video would allow him to go over Dennis, and gain tremendous leverage in the process. Holding Levan in this position would demand a completely irrealistic amount of arm strength from Dennis. Both athletes are exceptional, and legends, but the level at which armwrestling is now is different. Versatility is becoming more and more important, mechanical efficiency is more common. Beyond the fact that athletes like Michael Todd and Jerry Cadorette are growing old, climbing to the top with one ace technique or raw power is no longer feasible. The level is growing, athletes are fighting smarter submitted by /u/DeaXart [link] [comments]

competitions.title: 2026 EuroARM Budapest
competitions.summary: 2026 European Armwrestling & Para Armwrestling Championships – Record Numbers, Record Atmosphere! The European Armwrestling Federation (EAF) proudly welcomes more than 1300 athletes from 34 countries to the 35th European Armwrestling Championships and 28th European Para-Armwrestling Championships in Budapest, Hungary. Hosted at MTK Sportpark, this edition marks the biggest European Championships in EAF history. Competition […]

training.title: Thoughts on training split
training.summary: Pull day 1- Backpressure 4 sets,Pronation 4 sets,Bicep curl 3 sets (Morning). Then evening wrist curls 6 sets and reverse wrist curl 5 sets. Push day 1-Incline dumbbell press 4 sets,Weighted dips 4 sets and Lateral raises 4 sets. Rest day. Pull day 2- Riser 4 sets and Ulnar deviation 4 sets (morning). Then evening 4 sets weighted pullups and 4 sets barbell rows Push day 2-Exact same as Push day 1 2 Rest days. I cant train side pressure right now but i am planning to get a pulley soon. submitted by /u/Affectionate_Ride746 [link] [comments]
